'''Kut-Rate Kruise Lines''', also known as '''Kut-Rate Kruises''', was a transport company during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] which provided cheap conveyance to a number of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Although their [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were poorly kept, they had a good record of reaching their destinations with little to no problems.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}}
